changelog: Reverted the aggressive recovery behaviour from v1.44.62-64. Buffer-stall threshold raised from 4 s → 20 s (live) and frozen-position from 4 s → 15 s. STATE_ENDED-on-live recovery removed. Recovery now uses a bare player.prepare() (the stable behaviour from before v1.44.62) instead of a full source rebuild.
'Reconnecting…' pill no longer shows on the first retry attempt — only from the 2nd attempt onward. Most freezes resolve invisibly on the first attempt.
Full-screen player now matches the mini-preview's reliability.
